NOTICE OF ASSIGNMENT OF JUDGMENT FILED BY ASSIGNEE LABOR COMMISSIONER, STATE OF CALIFORNIA AS TO DEFENDANT ROYAL SCOTT, JR., AN INDIVIDUAL DBA ROYALTY PRO PAINTING & DECORATING
